plan.sketch: Slice: add a structured ecosystem-overlap-matrix field to the review_result contract+schema (per {native feature | official plugin} x {overlap grade | rationale}); the protocol requires the ecosystem lens to populate it so the surviving-wedge conclusion always ships with its audit. Closes G13.

Slice: bound the embedded charter in emit - full text for recent N workstreams + all open items, title+retro-verdict digest for older closed - so review context stops growing monotonically. Closes/mitigates G11.
Spike: evaluate a null-check evidence-trail field (G19/M2) recording which checks were re-derived, when, and the outcome, weighed against the context-bloat cost it adds.

Spike: evaluate fields for steelmanned-away/near findings + rejection reasoning and a re-surfacing mechanism (G20/M5/M8), and a dedicated structural-simplification lens, against the protocol's deliberate minimalism.

workstream.title: Make the review protocol auditable and scale-resilient
